name: Tuna W/2 Sesames
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the black and white sesame seeds together.
2. Dredge the tuna steaks in the sesame seed mixture until well coated.
3. Shake off any excess sesame seeds from the tuna.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste, then sauté the shiitake mushrooms until they are hot and slightly browned.
6. In another hot skillet, add 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and 1 teaspoon of sesame oil.
7. Sear the tuna steaks on both sides until medium-rare to rare.
8. Whisk together the wasabi powder, heavy cream, and beurre blanc in a bowl.
9. Serve the tuna with the sautéed mushrooms and sauce.
